title: limonium catalaunicum subsp. procerum
intro: Limonium catalaunicum subsp. procerum, commonly known as the Procerum Statice or Purple Sea Lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium catalaunicum subsp. procerum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
